hook.name: UruLaunchHook
hook.description: Uniswap V4 hook for the URU token launch that collects a time-decaying sniper tax (up to 99% at launch, decaying to 1% over a configured duration) on each swap via afterSwapReturnsDelta, sending proceeds to a vault. Also tracks per-epoch URU/WETH volume to compute and emit an emission rate signal for external consumers.
